description: Security-priority defect remediation pass — 10 issues (2 blocking, 3 high, 3 medium, 2 low)

fixes.title: Core modules NotImplemented / placeholder
changes: classes/handler.go: implemented create (INSERT+RETURNING), update (COALESCE PATCH), cancel (status guard), book (member lookup + capacity check + duplicate-join guard + FOR UPDATE), cancelBooking (FOR UPDATE + GREATEST(0, booked_seats-1))

users/handler.go: implemented list (paginated), create (bcrypt hash + 23505 dupe check), get, update (COALESCE PATCH), delete (soft-deactivate + self-deletion guard); added RequireRoles(Administrator) sub-group for all management routes
router/index.tsx: replaced PlaceholderPage for /classes and /admin with ClassListPage and AdminUsersPage; removed unused PlaceholderPage import
Created ClassListPage with list, book, cancel-booking, cancel-class actions
Created AdminUsersPage with list, create-user dialog, edit-user dialog, deactivate action
Created api/classes.ts and api/users.ts — all calls go through apiRequest wrapper

fixes.title: API integration test harness false-green under Docker test compose
changes: testConfig() now reads DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL from environment; falls back to localhost values for local dev without a test DB
setupRouter() uses t.Fatalf (hard fail) when DATABASE_URL env var is set (CI/Docker context) and t.Skipf only in its absence
Redis client now built via redis.ParseURL(cfg.Redis.URL) so docker-compose.test.yml redis-test host is honoured
Added redisAddrFromURL helper for any test that needs a raw Addr string

fixes.title: Member data enumeration via /members endpoints (missing object-level authorization)
changes: RegisterRoutes: list restricted to RequireRoles(administrator, operations_manager) — member role can no longer enumerate all member records
get: member role may only fetch their own record; foreign IDs return 404
orders: member role may only fetch orders for their own member record; foreign IDs return 404
groupBuys: member role may only fetch group-buys for their own member record; foreign IDs return 404

fixes.title: Order timeline and note write/read object-level authorization gap
changes: timeline: member role resolves own memberID, checks it matches the order's member_id; returns 404 on mismatch
addNote: same ownership check applied before note insertion or existence verification

fixes.title: Sync endpoint leaks global member records
changes: Added fitcommerce/backend/internal/auth import
members case: administrator and operations_manager receive all records (unchanged); all other roles receive only the row matching their own user_id

fixes.title: Group-buy visibility leakage (draft details and participant member IDs)
changes: get: non-staff roles receive 404 when group-buy status is draft
participants: MemberID field is cleared to empty string for non-staff responses, hiding member identifiers
Fixed import: replaced unused net/http with required context (needed by EvaluateCutoffs)

fixes.title: Offline sync pull hydration logic mismatch
changes: pullChanges: changed Array.isArray(data) check to read data?.[entityType] — server returns an entity-keyed map { items:[...], orders:[...] } not a flat array
Records are now correctly extracted per entity type before hydration

fixes.title: Dashboard/report requirement gap (missing coach/filter controls)
changes: DashboardPage: added coachId state, Coach ID text field, and wired to params.coach_id; useEffect dependency array updated
reports/handler.go dashboard: added coach_id query param — admin/ops can filter coach productivity by arbitrary coach ID; coach role still scoped to own data only
reports/handler.go: replaced class fill rate strings_replace(locationFilter,...) identity call with direct locationFilter; removed dead strings_replace helper

fixes.title: Frontend API access style inconsistent
changes: client.ts: added rawResponse?: boolean option to RequestOptions; when true, apiRequest returns the full JSON body instead of unwrapping .data — preserves meta field for paginated responses
items.ts listItems: replaced raw fetch (no auto-refresh) with apiRequest(..., { rawResponse: true })
orders.ts listOrders: replaced raw fetch (no auto-refresh) with apiRequest(..., { rawResponse: true })

fixes.title: PDF generator produces compatibility issues (startxref fixed as 0)
changes: generatePDF: builds each PDF object (header, obj1-5) as discrete strings to enable exact byte-offset arithmetic
Computes off1..off5 and xrefOffset by accumulating string lengths
xref table now uses computed offsets; startxref is set to xrefOffset (was hardcoded 0)
PDF is assembled by concatenation of parts rather than fmt.Sprintf with a heredoc template
